testModifications.reasoning: The precheck-checks.test.ts file was updated to match the new function signature of checkOptionalCommands(), which now requires a workdir parameter. The changes add proper setup/teardown for a temporary directory and update function calls from checkOptionalCommands(config) to checkOptionalCommands(config, testDir). These are legitimate fixes that align with the implementation changes. No test assertions were loosened or removed.

criteria.criterion: review/runner.ts:resolveCommand() priority chain for typecheck: (1) execution.typecheckCommand, (2) review.commands.typecheck, (3) quality.commands.typecheck, (4) package.json typecheck script
criteria.notes: Implementation at src/review/runner.ts:51-82 correctly implements the priority chain with execution check (lines 52-58), review.commands check (lines 62-64), quality.commands check (lines 67-72), and package.json fallback (lines 75-78)

criteria.criterion: review/runner.ts:resolveCommand() priority chain for lint: (1) execution.lintCommand, (2) review.commands.lint, (3) quality.commands.lint, (4) package.json lint script
criteria.notes: Same resolveCommand() function handles both typecheck and lint via ReviewCheckName parameter. Priority chain applies to both checks identically.

criteria.criterion: Setting quality.commands.typecheck in config.json now correctly runs that command in the review stage
criteria.notes: Data flow verified: config.quality flows through src/pipeline/stages/review.ts -> reviewOrchestrator.review() (src/review/orchestrator.ts:55) -> runReview() (src/review/runner.ts:205) -> resolveCommand() where quality.commands is checked as fallback

criteria.criterion: review.commands.typecheck still takes precedence over quality.commands.typecheck when both are set
criteria.notes: Priority verified: review.commands (step 2, lines 62-64) is checked before quality.commands (step 3, lines 67-72). Test case at runner-rq003.test.ts:114-126 confirms review command takes precedence when both are set.

criteria.criterion: CLI config --explain description for quality.commands.typecheck updated to note it is used as fallback in review stage
criteria.notes: Description at src/cli/config.ts:83-84 updated to: 'Custom typecheck command (used as fallback in review stage if review.commands.typecheck is not set)'. Lint description similarly updated at line 85.

criteria.criterion: Unit tests: quality.commands.typecheck set with review.commands.typecheck absent -> quality command used; both set -> review command takes precedence
criteria.notes: Test cases in test/unit/review/runner-rq003.test.ts: (1) lines 87-97 verify quality command is used when review.commands absent; (2) lines 114-126 verify review command takes precedence when both are set. All 8 new tests pass. Symmetric tests for lint at lines 133-157.

reasoning: All tests pass (1421 passed, 0 failed). The implementation cleanly adds the quality.commands fallback to the review resolution chain with the correct priority order. The changes properly flow the quality config through the pipeline to the review runner. Test modifications are legitimate updates to match the new checkOptionalCommands() function signature. All acceptance criteria are fully met. Code quality is high with proper error handling and documentation.
